================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 60 49 86 24 12
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1875
Reflected CC   : 0x1A
RetType        : 0x05
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 124

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1875
ReflectedCC  : 0x1A
PayloadLen   : 124

[EPS P60 ACU GET TABLE HK]

[Inputs]
c_in[0..5]: 96 106 108 106 103 97
v_in[0..5]: 11782 11793 11821 11794 11836 11874

[Bus/Temp]
vbat: 16316
vcc : 3275
temp[0..2]: 232 231 234

[MPPT]
mppt_mode: 1
vboost[0..5]: 11612 11612 11612 11612 11612 11612
power[0..5]: 1131 1250 1276 1250 1219 1151

[DAC]
dac_en[0..2]: 1 1 1
dac_val[0..5]: 433 433 433 433 433 433

[Boot/Time]
bootcause : 0
bootcnt   : 256
uptime    : 145
resetcause: 0xEAAF

[MPPT Timing]
mppt_time  : 5
mppt_period: 1

[Device]
device_type[0..7]: 22 0 49 0 0 0 7 1
device_status[0..7]: 1 3 3 3 4 0 1 1

[WDT]
wdt_cnt_gnd : 65793
wdt_gnd_left: 6
